name: Toasty Pecan Drop Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate and butter over hot water, then cool.
2. Beat the eggs until foamy.
3. Add sugar, 2 tablespoons at a time, beating until thickened.
4. Blend in the melted chocolate.
5. Add flour, baking powder, salt, and cinnamon; blend thoroughly.
6. Stir in vanilla and pecans.
7. Drop by teaspoonfuls onto a greased baking sheet.
8. Bake at 350°F until the cookies feel set when lightly touched (about 8-10 minutes).
9. Cool slightly on the sheet.
